creator: pvz@itassistans.se
text:
Seems that the sysutils/megacli port no longer installs:

diskmaskin02# make install
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> 8.01.06_FreeBSD_MegaCLI.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.lsi.com/DistributionSystem/User/AssetMgr.aspx?asset=56628&/8.01.06_FreeBSD_MegaCLI.zip
fetch: http://www.lsi.com/DistributionSystem/User/AssetMgr.aspx?asset=56628&/8.01.06_FreeBSD_MegaCLI.zip: Temporary Redirect
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/8.01.06_FreeBSD_MegaCLI.zip
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/8.01.06_FreeBSD_MegaCLI.zip: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli.

diskmaskin02#

After some investigation is teems that the URL to the file in question has changed.

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=    samflanker@gmail.com--XSdvgHmEVUJZmCGvmc1c8yrJDmCq6yUPd8xgoRYCLLt4ZAi1
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli/Makefile.orig   2011-06-20 18:42:42.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli/Makefile        2011-06-20 18:43:47.000000000 +0200
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      megacli
 PORTVERSION=   8.01.06
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.lsi.com/DistributionSystem/User/AssetMgr.aspx?asset=56628&/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://www.lsi.com/downloads/Public/MegaRAID%20Common%20Files/
 DISTNAME=      ${PORTVERSION}_FreeBSD_MegaCLI
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli
# make install
